user.title: Configure Climote Heating
user.description: Enter your Climote portal credentials. Your **Climote Device No.** is the number printed on your Climote hub (e.g. `1234567890`). You can also find it on the [Climote portal login page](https://climote.climote.ie/manager/login).

data_description.email: The email address used to log in to the Climote portal.
data_description.device_id: Your 10-digit Climote Device Number printed on the hub or shown at login.
data_description.pin: Only required if your account has a Security PIN enabled.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Climote servers. Check your internet connection.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid email address or Climote Device No. Please check your credentials.
error.unknown: Unexpected error occurred. Check Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Climote Device is already configured.

init.title: Climote Options
init.description: Adjust polling and boost settings. **Minimum poll interval is 1800 seconds (30 minutes)** to avoid exceeding GSM SMS limits.

data_description.poll_interval: How often to fetch status from the cloud cache. Minimum 1800s (30 min).
data_description.boost_duration: Select how long to boost when triggered (in 15-minute intervals).
